descriptionShort: Profile of Richmond Sockeyes defenceman Mike Claringbull pursuing aviation career over professional hockey.
descriptionLong: At the 1987 Centennial Cup in Humboldt, Saskatchewan, Richmond Sockeyes defenceman Mike Claringbull discusses his passion for flying and aspiration to become a bush pilot rather than pursue a professional hockey career. The native of St. Lawrence, Newfoundland previously played for Medicine Hat Tigers and trained with the Montreal Canadiens organization. Claringbull is completing commercial pilot training while working toward his aviation goals.

attribution.headline: Sockeye vet has sights set on career in air
